message:
Update bun.lock with @ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock and dependency updates

Lockfile regenerated to reflect the addition of @ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock
(^1.1.6) as a new direct dependency, enabling Amazon Bedrock as an
AI provider alongside the existing Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI
providers.

The new dependency brings in @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime and its
full AWS SDK transitive dependency tree (@aws-sdk/credential-providers,
@smithy/* utilities, @aws-crypto, etc.). The lockfile also captures
updates to existing transitive dependencies from the bun install that
resolved the new package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
